inputs.label: Average Invoice Value
inputs.businessContext: Average monetary value of a single invoice issued to customers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average monetary value of a single invoice issued to customers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterilere kesilen tek bir faturanın ortalama parasal değeri.

inputs.label: Annual Invoice Count
inputs.businessContext: Total number of invoices issued per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of invoices issued per year.

inputs.label: Current Payment Terms (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Current net payment term offered to customers (e.g., Net 30).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current net payment term offered to customers (e.g., Net 30).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterilere sunulan mevcut net ödeme vadesi (örn. Net 30).

inputs.label: Proposed Payment Terms (Days)
inputs.businessContext: New net payment term to be evaluated (e.g., Net 15).

businessContext_i18n.en: New net payment term to be evaluated (e.g., Net 15).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değerlendirilecek yeni net ödeme vadesi (örn. Net 15).

inputs.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage discount offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Net 30).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage discount offered for early payment (e.g., 2/10 Net 30).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken ödeme için sunulan yüzde iskonto (örn. 2/10 Net 30).

inputs.label: Discount Window (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days within which the discount can be taken (e.g., 10 days for 2/10).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days within which the discount can be taken (e.g., 10 days for 2/10).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İskontonun kullanılabileceği gün sayısı (örn. 2/10 için 10 gün).

inputs.label: Cost of Capital (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the company.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the company.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirket için yıllık ağırlıklı ortalama sermaye maliyeti (WACC).

inputs.label: Customer Acceptance Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of customers who will take the early payment discount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of customers who will take the early payment discount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken ödeme iskontosunu kullanacak müşterilerin tahmini yüzdesi.

rules.message: Proposed terms must be shorter than current terms to achieve optimization.
Discount window cannot exceed proposed payment terms.
Discount rate should be greater than cost of capital to incentivize early payment.

thresholds.message: DSO reduction is less than 5 days; consider more aggressive terms.
Annual discount cost exceeds 2% of revenue; evaluate net benefit.
Low acceptance rate may indicate discount is not attractive enough.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
